description: RetryStrategy contains information about the strategy to apply when a sync failed

backoff.description: Backoff controls how to backoff on subsequent retries of failed syncs

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of attempts for retrying a failed sync. If set to 0, no retries will be performed.

refresh.description: Refresh indicates if the latest revision should be used on retry instead of the initial one (default: false)
